text1:
A sheer-white, impossibly smooth, tetrahedron ship utilized by the Araril Empire as an exploration vessel, also rented out at a reasonable price to citizenry for leisure. The advanced material making up its hull allows it to withstand almost any damage, except extreme gravitational distortion, such as that from blackholes.

Despite its apparent frigate size, it features non-euclidean internal geometry that allows it to house systems on par with cruisers. Within this space, advanced onboard systems allow it to sense objects from great distances and survey worlds efficiently. Due to differences in dimensional physics, its warp shield operates similarly to p-space technology prevalent in the sector.

When Dr.Kel and Argemia accidentally clipped into the gm_construct dimension with the ship, the onboard systems malfunctioned and dropped them into an unknown dimension, i.e the sector.
